creator: decke@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 11.11.2011 13:52, Marco Steinbach wrote:
> Bernhard Froehlich wrote on 11.11.2011 10:00:
>> Ed Schouten created a patch for this which was already submitted 
>> upstream but has not been reviewed yet. Feedback for the patch is 
>> welcome.
>> 
>> https://www.virtualbox.org/pipermail/vbox-dev/2011-November/004768.html
>>
>
> I can try and test it again, if you'd like me to -- I understand ed@
> changed the vboxdev naming after my initial testing runs.

You don't have to. I just posted to link here as a reference for other 
people finding this PR.

-- 
Bernhard Froehlich
http://www.bluelife.at/
